description: Perform a voltage drop compliance audit for 50 electrical branch circuits in 'commercial_circuits.xlsx'. The audit requires populating the Resistance (Column H) with conductor resistance from 'NEC_Table_8' based on wire size and material, calculating the Voltage Drop (Column I) as (2 * Length * Resistance * Load) / 1000, and calculating the % Drop (Column J) as Voltage Drop / System Voltage (formatted as a percentage with 2 decimal places). The Status (Column K) must indicate 'FAIL' for drops greater than 3.00% or 'PASS' otherwise, with 'FAIL' cells highlighted with a red background. Save the updated workbook to 'commercial_circuits.xlsx'.

metadata.nec_table_source: NFPA 70 National Electrical Code, Chapter 9, Table 8
